title: S + need not / don't need to + V

formulas.zh: 主詞 + 情態動詞 need not + 動詞原形，表示不必做某事

formulas.formula: S + don't/doesn't need to + V (原形)
formulas.zh: 主詞 + 一般動詞 don't/doesn't need to + 動詞原形，表示不必做某事

explanation: 「need not」為情態動詞用法，後接動詞原形，無人稱變化，主要用於正式文體；「don't need to」為一般動詞用法，有人稱變化（I/you/we/they don't need to；he/she/it doesn't need to），更常見於日常口語和現代英文。兩者皆表示「無必要」或「不必」之意。注意：need not 與 must not 意思截然不同，前者表非必要，後者表禁止。過去式為 needed not 或 didn't need to。

examples.eng: You need not worry about the exam because you've studied hard.
examples.chi: 你不必擔心考試，因為你已經認真讀書了。

examples.eng: She doesn't need to take the bus since her father will drive her to school.
examples.chi: 她不必搭公車，因為她爸爸會開車送她上學。

examples.eng: We need not attend the meeting if it's not important for our project.
examples.chi: 如果會議對我們的專案不重要，我們就不必參加。

examples.eng: The students don't need to submit their homework on Friday afternoon.
examples.chi: 學生們不必在星期五下午提交作業。

extension.tip: 判斷使用時：need not 較正式、文學性強，常見於書面英文或正式場合；don't need to 更口語化、現代，日常溝通更常見。若強調「被禁止」要用 must not；若強調「不必但可以做」用 need not/don't need to。

examples.test: You need not come early. vs. You must not come early.
examples.result: → 前者：不必提早來（可提早也可不提早）；後者：禁止提早來（不能提早）

examples.test: He doesn't need to call her vs. He needs not to call her.
examples.result: → 正確：doesn't need to；錯誤：need 為情態時不加 to，一般動詞才加 to

examples.test: We don't need to bring gifts. (現在) vs. We didn't need to bring gifts. (過去)
examples.result: → 過去式用 didn't need to，need not 通常只用現在式，少用過去

extension.note: 情態 need not 無人稱變化，一般 don't/doesn't need to 有人稱變化——這是兩種用法的核心區別。

parts: answer all the questions on the test.
Just focus on the main ones.
exercises.sentence: You need not answer all the questions on the test. Just focus on the main ones.
exercises.translation: 你不必回答考試上的所有題目。只需要專注於主要的題目。

parts: finish their projects by next week.
exercises.sentence: My students don't need to finish their projects by next week. We have more time.
exercises.translation: 我的學生不必在下週完成他們的專案。我們還有更多時間。

parts: If you have a car, you
exercises.sentence: If you have a car, you don't need to take the subway anymore.
exercises.translation: 如果你有車，你就不必再搭地鐵了。

parts: remind him again because he already knows the deadline.
exercises.sentence: We need not remind him again because he already knows the deadline.
exercises.translation: 我們不必再次提醒他，因為他已經知道截止期限了。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的情態動詞形式填空，表示「無必要」
mc_exercises.question_eng: You _______ bring an umbrella today because the weather forecast says it will be sunny.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A「need not」。本句表示「無必要帶傘」，need not 表非必要性。B 項 must not 表禁止，意思相反；C 項 should not 表不應該；D 項 cannot 表不能。只有 A 符合文意。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 根據人稱代詞選擇正確的動詞形式表達無必要
mc_exercises.question_eng: She _______ attend the morning meeting since her boss approved her late arrival.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B「doesn't need to」。主語 she 為第三人稱單數，使用一般動詞 don't/doesn't need to 時需加 s。A 項人稱不符；C 項 need not to 文法錯誤，need not 後不接 to；D 項否定形式錯誤，應置於 do/does 後。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 在正式書信中選擇適當的情態動詞表示非必要
mc_exercises.question_eng: Applicants _______ submit additional documents if they have already provided all required materials.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B「need not」。此為正式書信或官方文體，適合使用 need not（情態動詞）表示「無必要」。A 項雖正確但較口語；C 項 must not 表禁止意思錯誤；D 項被動語態結構不當，且 be needed to 不是標準用法。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 綜合判斷語境選擇適當形式，且正確表達否定意思
mc_exercises.question_eng: The students _______ complete the optional assignment, but those who wish to improve their grades _______ do so.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B「don't need to; can」。第一空表示「不必完成」用 don't need to；第二空表示「可以做」用 can（表示允許）。A 項後半搭配不當；C 項 must not 表禁止，與文意不符；D 項後半 must not 表禁止，邏輯錯誤，應表許可。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 你不必為明天的小考太擔心。
translation_exercises.answer: You don't need to worry too much about tomorrow's quiz.
hints: 提示1：主詞是 you，用 don't need to（一般動詞用法），後接動詞原形 worry
提示2：易錯點─勿用 must not worry（禁止）替代，兩者意思完全不同

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 他不必參加這個補習班，因為他的成績已經很好了。
translation_exercises.answer: He doesn't need to attend this cram school because his grades are already very good.
hints: 提示1：主詞是 he，用 doesn't need to（第三人稱單數），後接原形動詞 attend
提示2：注意人稱變化─he/she/it 用 doesn't；I/you/we/they 用 don't

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 由於學校已經提供午餐，學生們不必自己帶便當。
translation_exercises.answer: Since the school has already provided lunch, students don't need to bring their own lunch boxes.
key_points: own 強調所有權或自備
hints: 提示1：句型為 S + don't need to + V，此處 students 為複數，用 don't；若改為 'a student' 須用 doesn't
提示2：易錯點─need not 屬正式文體常用於書面語，日常口語多用 don't need to

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 這份報告不必包含所有細節，只要涵蓋主要重點就足夠了。
translation_exercises.answer: This report doesn't need to include all the details; it is sufficient as long as it covers the main points.
key_points: as long as 條件連接詞
hints: 提示1：主詞 report 為第三人稱單數，用 doesn't need to；後接原形動詞 include
提示2：易錯點─勿混淆 'need not / don't need to'（非必要）與 'must not'（禁止）；此句若用 'must not' 會變成『禁止包含』，意思相反
